title: iso20022-readiness-suite-mcp
description: High-level orchestration Model Context Protocol server for the ISO 20022 MCP Suite: the white-label ISO 20022 readiness and testing gateway. It is an MCP server to the outer agent and an MCP client to the foundational suite servers (iso20022-mcp, camt053-mcp, pain001-mcp, reconcile-mcp, bankstatementparser-mcp, structured-address-fix-mcp), which it spawns over stdio via the meta-client pattern. Exposes 4 tools over stdio: clearing-profile discovery for CBPR+, SEPA_Instant, FedNow, and Generic (list_profiles); detect/validate/profile-lint/score a payload's Nov 2026 readiness (run_readiness_check); automated remediation such as structured-address fixes (remediate_payload); and pacs.002 bank-response simulation for ACCP/RJCT/PDNG outcomes (simulate_bank_response). list_profiles and simulate_bank_response run standalone; run_readiness_check and remediate_payload reach the underlying servers, which must be uvx-resolvable. SLSA Build L3 provenance + PEP 740 sigstore attestations + CycloneDX/SPDX/licenses SBOMs on every release; NIST SP 800-218 SSDF practice IDs mapped in SECURITY.md.
